articles.title: Bruins’ prospect James Hagens turns pro, will begin career in Providence
articles.description:
Hagens is coming off a sophomore season at Boston College where he posted 47 points in 34 games.

The post Bruins’ prospect James Hagens turns pro, will begin career in Providence appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Hagens signs entry-level contract with Bruins, starting pro career in Providence.
Hagens scored 47 points in 34 games during his sophomore season at Boston College.
His transition to Providence strengthens the Bruins' development pipeline for local talent.

articles.title: 7 X-factors on 2026 Red Sox roster
articles.description:
Boston's ceiling may not be reached this season if the Red Sox don't get key contributions from players like Marcelo Mayer, Brayan Bello, and others.

The post 7 X-factors on 2026 Red Sox roster appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox may struggle to reach their potential without key players contributing this season.
Marcelo Mayer and Brayan Bello are identified as crucial for the team's success.
Local fans should monitor these players' performances for the team's future prospects.
